title: Abacus AI Just Dropped AI SuperComputer With Claude And Gemini
summary: Abacus AI launched AI SuperComputer, a cloud platform that enables AI agents to build, deploy, host, and run software in real Ubuntu environments. The platform provides integrated access to databases, storage, terminal access, SSH, GitHub, AWS, custom subdomains, and HTTPS deployment, moving agents beyond code generation to live application execution.
